summary.title: AEP PatternSpec Production Semantics Hardening
summary.description: Validation of PatternSpec production semantics hardening features including commit SHA binding, evidence persistence requirements, governance policy requirements, and agent operator validation. Ensures PatternSpecs deployed to production meet strict production truth and governance requirements.

patternSpec.purpose: Canonical declarative event pattern language for AEP with production semantics requirements

hardeningFeatures.description: Binds PatternSpec to commit SHA for production truth tracking.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateGovernance() checks commitSha presence and format in production environment. commitSha parameter passed to validate() method.
validationRules: Production environment requires non-null, non-empty commit SHA
Non-production environments do not require commit SHA
Commit SHA is validated in governance section
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Production semantics hardening tests with 3 tests for commit SHA

hardeningFeatures.description: Requires evidence policy and evidence store configuration in production.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateLifecycle() checks for evidencePolicy and evidenceStore in production environment.
validationRules: Non-production environments do not require evidence configuration
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Production semantics hardening tests with 3 tests for evidence persistence

hardeningFeatures.description: Requires approval or review policy in production for governance.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateGovernance() checks for approvalPolicy or reviewPolicy in production environment.
validationRules: Production environment requires governance.approvalPolicy or governance.reviewPolicy
Non-production environments do not require approval/review policy
Agent actions require governance policy regardless of environment
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Production semantics hardening tests with 3 tests for governance policy

hardeningFeatures.description: Validates agent operators have required output schemas and governance policies.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateExpression() checks agent operators for outputSchema. validateAgentAction() checks for governance policy, approval policy, and toolPolicy.
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Existing tests with 4 tests for agent operator validation

hardeningFeatures.description: Validates semantics section includes required time, uncertainty, and replay policies.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateSemantics() checks for timePolicy/timeMode, uncertaintyPolicy, and replayPolicy.
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Existing test with 1 test for semantics validation

hardeningFeatures.description: Validates lifecycle section includes state and production-specific evidence configuration.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: validateLifecycle() checks for state and production-specific evidencePolicy and evidenceStore.
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Production semantics hardening tests with 3 tests for lifecycle validation

testCategories.name: Basic Validation
testCategories.coverage: Agent predicate in sequence, unknown operator rejection, agent operator without output schema, agent action without governance, agent action without tool policy, governed agent action, production semantics, sequence operands, window validation, timed window

testCategories.name: Production Semantics Hardening (AEP-004)
testCategories.coverage: Production requires commit SHA, production accepts valid commit SHA, production rejects invalid commit SHA format, non-production does not require commit SHA, production requires evidence policy, production requires evidence store, production accepts evidence policy and store, production requires approval or review policy, production accepts approval policy, production accepts review policy

patternSpecCompiler.purpose: Compiles PatternSpec into executable operator DAG

operatorKind.purpose: Operator kind enumeration including agent operators

productionTruthGuarantees: PatternSpecs are bound to specific commit SHA in production
Commit SHA format is validated (40-character hexadecimal)
Evidence persistence is required in production
Governance policies are required in production
Agent operators have output schema validation
Agent actions require governance and tool policies
Semantics include time, uncertainty, and replay policies
Lifecycle state is required for all patterns
securityConsiderations: Commit SHA binding prevents deployment of unverified patterns
Evidence persistence ensures audit trail in production
Governance policies enforce human review for production changes
Agent operator validation prevents untyped agent outputs
Agent action governance prevents unauthorized side effects
notes: Commit SHA binding is enforced for production environment only
Evidence persistence is required in production for audit trail
Governance policies ensure human review for production changes
Agent operators require output schemas for type safety
Agent actions require governance and tool policies for safety
Test coverage includes all production semantics hardening features
Production truth is maintained through commit SHA and evidence persistence
